inspectables.name: Terminal
inspectables.text: The terminal indicates that all greenhouse systems are operating normally.

inspectables.name: Locker
inspectables.text: Your locker contains only spare clothing.

inspectables.name: Burned Plants
inspectables.text: Most of the plants have been destroyed by the fire.

inspectables.name: Water Pump
inspectables.text: The emergency sprinkler system has already shut down.
